lines.speaker: Ghost guard
lines.text: All visitors to Port Phasmatys must pay a toll charge of 2 Ectotokens.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I would like to enter Port Phasmatys - here's 2 Ectotokens.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not paying you Ectotokens just to go through a gate.

lines.speaker: Ghost guard
lines.text: You need to go to the Temple and earn some. Talk to the disciples - they will tell you how.

lines.speaker: Ghost guard
lines.text: All visitors to Port Phasmatys must pay a toll charge of 2 Ectotokens. However, you have done the ghosts of our town a service that surpasses all value, so you may pass without charge.
